zh.lifeSummary: 當Jennet Potts於1567年7月5日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾梅瑟利時，她的父親Leonard Potts26歲，母親Isabell Collett23歲。她於1588年11月5日與Thomas Lister在英國越可爾利德斯利德斯 明斯特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jennet Potts于1567年7月5日出生在英国英格兰越可爾梅瑟利时，她的父亲Leonard Potts26岁，母亲Isabell Collett23岁。她于1588年11月5日与Thomas Lister在英国越可爾利德斯利德斯 明斯特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Potts
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Pott , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s, in the former case denoting a Pot(t)'s son, relative or servant.

variants.name: Pott
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Aloys, Christoph, Hans, Otto.
English: from the personal name Pot, an Old French pet form of Philipot (see Philpott ), itself a pet form of Philip .

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a depression in the ground, from Middle English pot, potte ‘pot’ used in this transferred sense, or a habitational name from one of the minor places deriving their name from this word, in the sense ‘pit, hole’.

nameMeanings.name: Jennet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a simplified spelling of   Jeannette   or a revival of a medieval pet form of the female name   Jean .

variants.name: Jeannette
meanings: diminutive form of Jeanne, feminine form of Jean ‘John’, now also used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Jennet Potts was born on 5 July 1567, in Methley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Leonard Potts, was 26 and her mother, Isabell Collett, was 23. She married Thomas Lister on 5 November 1588, in Leeds Minster, Leeds, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jennet Potts est née le 5 juillet 1567, à Methley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Leonard Potts, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabell Collett, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Lister le 5 novembre 1588, à Leeds Minster, Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jennet Potts am 5. Juli 1567 in Methley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Leonard Potts 26 und ihre Mutter Isabell Collett 23. Sie hat am 5. November 1588 in Leeds Minster, Leeds, Yorkshire, England Thomas Lister geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter.

Lei sposato Thomas Lister il 5 novembre 1588, nel Leeds Minster, Leeds, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Jennet Pottsが1567年7月5日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアメスリーで生まれた時，父Leonard Pottsは26歳，母Isabell Collettは23歳であった。1588年11月5日にイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズリーズ ミンスターでThomas Listerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Jennet Potts(이)가 1567년 7월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 멧h리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Leonard Potts(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabell Collett(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1588년 11월 5일 영국 요르크실르 리드즈 리드즈 민스터에서 Thomas Lister(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jennet Potts nasceu em 5 de julho de 1567, em Methley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Leonard Potts, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Collett, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Lister em 5 de novembro de 1588, em Leeds Minster, Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas.

ru.Saint Mary the Virgin, Gisburn, Lancashi: сеинт мэри т виргин, дин, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jennet Potts родилась 5 июля 1567 г. в местности метли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Leonard Potts было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Collett, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Lister 5 ноября 1588 г. в местности лидс минстир, лидс, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей.
